name: polish-genealogy-mcp
description: Heredis (read-only) + Geneteka and Genealogia w Archiwach search for Polish genealogy research.
long_description: Multi-source MCP server for Polish genealogy. Two tiers: (1) read-only access to a local Heredis SQLite file (verified facts), and (2) live search of the Geneteka parish-record indexes and Genealogia w Archiwach (research candidates). Live sources are rate-limited and use a browser-style User-Agent. Requires Python 3.10+ available on PATH; runtime dependencies are pip-installed into the extension directory on first run.

heredis_db.title: Heredis database
heredis_db.description: Path to your local .heredis SQLite file. Leave empty to enable only the live research sources (Geneteka, Genealogia w Archiwach).

gedcom_path.title: GEDCOM file
gedcom_path.description: Path to a GEDCOM (.ged) file. Activates the gedcom_* tools as the verified-facts source. Use either this or heredis_db.

geneteka_min_interval.title: Geneteka rate limit (seconds)
geneteka_min_interval.description: Minimum interval between Geneteka requests. Default 5.

genealogia_w_archiwach_min_interval.title: Genealogia w Archiwach rate limit (seconds)
genealogia_w_archiwach_min_interval.description: Minimum interval between Genealogia w Archiwach requests. Default 5.

genbaza_min_interval.title: GenBaza rate limit (seconds)
genbaza_min_interval.description: Minimum interval between GenBaza requests. Default 5.

lubgens_min_interval.title: Lubgens rate limit (seconds)
lubgens_min_interval.description: Minimum interval between Lubgens (regestry.lubgens.eu) requests. Default 5.

genpod_min_interval.title: GenPod rate limit (seconds)
genpod_min_interval.description: Minimum interval between GenPod requests. Default 5.

genpod_username.title: GenPod username
genpod_username.description: Username for Projekt Podlasie GenPod (https://genpod.projektpodlasie.pl). Required to enable genpod_* tools.

genpod_password.title: GenPod password
genpod_password.description: Password for Projekt Podlasie GenPod. Required to enable genpod_* tools.
